Tutorials

This section provides step-by-step video tutorials to help users understand and effectively use miraX.

Core Platform Features

View tools/menu

Overview of the main tools and navigation menu in miraX.

Base Maps menu

How to use and switch between different basemaps.

Layers menu

Managing and interacting with map layers.

Time series analysis dashboard

Using dashboards to analyse temporal data.

Applications

GEOGLOWS application

Hydrological forecasting and river flow analysis.

OpenMeteo application

Accessing weather data and forecasts.

Data & Analysis Tools

WE-ACT Data Warehouse layers

Exploring available datasets from WE-ACT.

WE-ACT drought analysis tool

Drought monitoring and analysis tools.

Standardized Precipitation–Evapotranspiration Index (SPEI)

Global drought forecasting using SPEI.

ECMWF precipitation & temperature forecasts

Time-enabled forecasts for climate variables.

Specialized Tools

Peatland Subsidence Tool

Analysis of peatland subsidence and environmental impact.

Notes

  • Tutorials are grouped by functionality
  • Start with core platform features before moving to applications
  • Each video focuses on a specific tool or module within miraX
